news.headline: Stock market bulls predict S&P 500 to hit 7,000 by year-end, despite tariff concerns. Market up 3% in January.
news.summary: At the start of the year, the market saw a 3% increase in January due to optimism surrounding Trump's policies. This trend continued into February until concerns over tariffs arose. Trump initially planned to impose 25% tariffs on Mexico and Canada by February 1, but later addressed the fentanyl crisis instead. Despite these shifts, the market remained optimistic and continued to rise. However, on February 13, the market sentiment changed as discussions around tariffs escalated. For more information, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Vitol CEO Hardy: $60-$80/bbl oil is a reasonable range.
Untether AI introduces generative compiler tech, boosting AI model support by 4x in imAIgine SDK.
news.summary: In Toronto, Untether AI®, a notable player in energy-centric AI inference acceleration, has unveiled a significant advancement in AI model support and developer efficiency for imAIgine® Software Development Kit (SDK) users. Through pioneering generative compiler technology, the forthcoming update to the imAIgine SDK is set to accommodate four times as many AI models compared to its predecessors. Moreover, the generative compiler will generate fresh kernels for the layers of new neural networks that users may design.

news.headline: Deepseek investigating issue regarding R1 web/API service not being available - Status page
Beacon Roofing Supply (NASDAQ:BECN) stock surges as QXO Inc. (NYSE:QXO) eyes acquisition at $124.35/share, $11B total.
news.summary: Beacon Roofing Supply, Inc. (NASDAQ:BECN) saw an uptick in stock trading as news surfaced that QXO, Inc. (NYSE:QXO) is contemplating acquiring the company for approximately $11 billion. This potential deal would entail a price of $124.35 per share in cash. QXO is currently conducting standard due diligence on Beacon’s operations and is in discussions to finalize a formal agreement. In January, QXO announced its plan for an all-cash tender offer for Beacon Roofing Supply, culminating in a substantial financial transaction. More details on this development are accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Wall Street analysts lower Dick's Sporting Goods (DKS) price expectations ahead of Q4 earnings. Analysts predict earnings at $3.51 per share (down from $3.85 last year) and revenue at $3.77 billion (compared to $3.88 billion). DKS named official retailer of Texas Longhorns. Stock closed at $214.26.
news.summary: DICK’S Sporting Goods, Inc. (NYSE:DKS) is set to unveil its Q4 financials on March 11, with analysts predicting earnings of $3.51 per share, lower than the $3.85 reported last year. The company, based in Coraopolis, Pennsylvania, anticipates quarterly revenue of $3.77 billion, a decrease from $3.88 billion a year ago. Recent news includes DICK’S Sporting Goods becoming the official sporting goods retailer for the Texas Longhorns. The company’s shares closed at $214.26 on Friday, marking a 0.2% decrease. To delve into more analyst ratings and information, readers can visit Benzinga Pro.

news.headline: Balfour Beatty chosen for LAWA's Multiple Award Task Order Contract, part of prequalified contractors.
news.summary: A California-based company, Balfour Beatty, has been chosen to be part of the prequalified contractors for LAWA's Multiple Award Task Order Contracts in Los Angeles. This selection allows Balfour Beatty to bid on various task orders for construction projects at LAWA. This opportunity highlights the company's expertise and capability in the construction industry.

news.headline: Chris Stapleton to hold 2 exclusive shows at Ellis Theater in Philadelphia, MS on April 12 as fundraisers for Marty Stuart's Congress of Country Music.
news.summary: In Philadelphia on March 10, 2025, Marty Stuart's Congress of Country Music and the Ellis Theater revealed that Chris Stapleton is set to headline two unique fundraiser concerts at the iconic Ellis Theater in downtown Philadelphia, Mississippi. The exclusive shows are scheduled for Saturday, April 12th and all earnings generated will go towards a charitable cause.

news.headline: Horatio's 3rd Annual Client Summit in Santo Domingo gathered 140 industry leaders, clients and partners, focusing on innovation and economic development in Latin America. #HoratioSummit
news.summary: Horatio, a contemporary outsourcing firm transforming customer experience (CX) services and the business process outsourcing (BPO) sector, recently held its third annual Client Summit in Santo Domingo. Attended by 140 prominent figures from retail, fintech, and other sectors, the event served as a platform for industry leaders, clients, and partners to gather and collaborate on the future of outsourcing.

news.headline: Inventor from Santa Fe develops the HANGER PAK, a new hanging storage accessory for doors, to make items easily accessible.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 10, 2025, an inventor from Santa Fe, New Mexico shared their motivation behind the creation of the HANGER PAK. The inventor aimed to revolutionize the storage of items like backpacks and jackets on the back of a door. The innovative design of the HANGER PAK guarantees easy accessibility to items while maximizing storage space.

news.headline: Key executive acquires shares in company.
US Secretary of State Rubio lands in Saudi Arabia ahead of talks with Ukraine on Russia.
David Navetta joins Troutman Pepper Locke's Privacy & Cyber Practice, enhancing practice with his expertise.
news.summary: Renowned expert in privacy, information security, and technology law, David Navetta, has recently bolstered Troutman Pepper's already distinguished privacy and cyber practice in Chicago. The addition of Navetta, boasting decades of industry and practice leadership, enhances the firm's nationally recognized expertise in the field. The move, effective as of March 10, 2025, underscores the firm's commitment to further strengthening its capabilities in this area. Navetta's extensive experience is set to bring valuable insights to the team and solidify Troutman Pepper's position as a prominent player in the realm of privacy and cyber law.

news.headline: Attend Battery Safety, Regulations & Innovation Symposium in March 2025 by Americase & Shmuel De-Leon Energy for cutting-edge insights and lithium-ion safety demos. Register now!
news.summary: With the end of March approaching, there is a limited time left to sign up for a two-day event in WAXAHACHIE, Texas, happening on March 10, 2025. This event will showcase advanced insights and real-time demonstrations on lithium-ion battery safety. Americase and Shmuel De-Leon Energy Ltd. are hosting the event, which aims to provide valuable information to the battery industry. The event promises to offer cutting-edge knowledge and practical demonstrations, making it a must-attend for professionals in the field. Interested individuals are encouraged to register soon to secure their spot. Time is ticking, so don't miss out on this unique opportunity to enhance your understanding of lithium-ion battery safety.

news.headline: Energy sector and industry performance data, including key numbers, reported by Bloomberg.
Anolon launches new luxury cookware - Anolon® Everlast™ Ceramic Nonstick in Clad Stainless Steel, after 40 years of innovations.
news.summary: In Vallejo, California on March 10, 2025, Anolon, a leading cookware brand, marked almost four decades of revolutionizing kitchen tools for contemporary home cooks. Throughout the years, they have introduced groundbreaking advancements such as the initial hard-anodized nonstick cookware and the premier hybrid nonstick system tailored to meet the demands of cooking enthusiasts.

news.headline: CLIQ is considering delisting, causing stock drop by 10%. Shareholders to vote on decision soon.
Chinese courts to enhance measures to prevent youth crimes, maintaining "zero-tolerance." Focus on creating safe environment for children.
news.summary: Today, China Daily reported that Chinese courts are implementing stricter measures to prevent juvenile delinquency. They will enhance efforts to stop children from committing crimes while maintaining a "zero-tolerance" stance towards offenders. This initiative comes amidst a rise in youth crime rates, with data showing an increase of 15% in juvenile offenses over the past year. The courts will focus on rehabilitation and education programs to address the root causes of delinquency, in addition to imposing harsh penalties on those who break the law. The government aims to reduce juvenile crime by 20% within the next year through these intensified measures.

news.headline: Hyatt renames its Strategic Partner award to The Corry Oakes Strategic Partner Award, honoring OTO Development's late CEO. New award categories introduced at 2025 Americas Owners Conference.
news.summary: In Chicago, Hyatt Hotels Corporation (NYSE: H) revealed that its Strategic Partner award has been renamed as The Corry Oakes Strategic Partner Award to pay tribute to OTO Development's late co-founder and CEO who passed away in 2022. The announcement was made at the Hyatt's 2025 Americas Owners Conference held at Grand Hyatt Baha Mar. In addition to this award, the conference also included the introduction of two new categories, Purpose & Care and Operational Excellence. The event focused on various aspects of business and honored individuals who have contributed significantly to Hyatt's success.

news.headline: National Safety Council supports Intersociety Forum coalition's report on modern EHS practices; key principles outlined.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Washington, the National Safety Council, a prominent member of the Intersociety Forum (ISF), a coalition comprising top safety organizations, released a report titled Core Principles of Modern Occupational EHS Practice. This report emphasizes crucial guidelines for occupational safety and health practices.

news.headline: FSAC in California welcomes Dr. Amy Dhesi, a renowned fertility specialist, to their practice in Thousand Oaks.
news.summary: Dr. Amy Dhesi, a distinguished reproductive endocrinologist, has joined Fertility & Surgical Associates of California (FSAC) based in Thousand Oaks. This addition brings the total number of reproductive endocrinologists at FSAC to [insert number] in total.

news.headline: Verantos study in JAMA Network Open outlines framework for optimizing data reliability; collaboration with academic and industry leaders; FDA guidance in 2024.
news.summary: Verantos, a company based in Palo Alto, California, specializing in high-validity real-world evidence at scale, has recently revealed a study titled “Implementing Accuracy, Completeness, and Traceability for Data Reliability” in the JAMA Network Open. This groundbreaking research, developed with a group of academic and industry experts, introduces a replicable system for assessing and enhancing the dependability of real-world data. The study aims to address the growing importance of reliability in RWD. Notably, in 2024, the FDA issued a significant final guidance called “Real-World Evidence: Concept of Operations,” emphasizing the importance of reliable data in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Viral tech startup Totem partners with Same Same But Different Festival in Austin to innovate attendee experience.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Totem, a popular tech startup, has revealed a collaboration with the Same Same But Different Festival to introduce a groundbreaking partnership focusing on enhancing connection, safety, and overall immersive experience.

news.headline: NTT Research announces global summit Upgrade 2025, to be held on April 9-10, 2025 in San Francisco, focusing on AI innovation.
news.summary: NTT Research, Inc., a division of NTT (TYO:9432), has disclosed its intention to host Upgrade 2025, NTT’s Global Research & Innovation Summit, from April 9-10, 2025 at the Metreon City View in San Francisco. The summit aims to convene researchers, scientists, executives, and industry experts to explore ways to transition from innovative concepts to practical advancements, thus driving the global paradigm shift driven by artificial intelligence (AI). The event is anticipated to offer a platform for sharing insights and fostering collaboration in the rapidly evolving AI landscape.

news.headline: Employ Prince George's hosts Federal Employee Career Transition & Resource Fair to aid laid-off federal workers. (Count: 62)
news.summary: In Largo, Maryland on March 10, 2025, it has been reported that there have been significant layoffs impacting federal workers and contractors. Employ Prince George's, along with strategic partners including the Prince George's County Executive's Office and the Prince George's County Office of Human Resources, are working together to address this situation. The exact number of employees affected by the layoffs has not been disclosed, but it is a cause of concern within the community. The collaboration aims to provide support and assistance to those who have lost their jobs as a result of these cutbacks.

news.headline: Appalachian Basin has the lowest methane emissions intensity for unconventional natural gas development, per AMI report.
news.summary: PITTSBURGH, March 10, 2025 – The Appalachian Methane Initiative (AMI), comprised of top U.S. natural gas firms such as Ascent Resources, CNX Resources, EQT Corporation, Equitrans Midstream Corporation (now under EQT), Expand Energy Corporation, MPLX, and Seneca, is working towards methane reduction in the region.

news.headline: Dental Success Network partners with Workvivo by Zoom, replaces Workplace by Meta, upgrade effective March 2025.
news.summary: Prescott, Arizona - On March 10, 2025, the Dental Success Network (DSN) revealed a major improvement to its member platform. The upgrade involved shifting from Workplace by Meta to Workvivo by Zoom, taking effect in March 2025. This change showcases DSN's dedication to ensuring a more enhanced experience for its members.

news.headline: SchoolsFirst FCU strengthens partnership with Los Rios Community College District, sponsors events at American River College in California.
news.summary: A recent event held at American River College celebrated the accomplishments of both staff and student workforce, highlighting the importance of community colleges and the individuals behind their success. The event, sponsored by SchoolsFirst Federal Credit Union, took place in Tustin, California on March 10, 2025. SchoolsFirst Federal Credit Union, recognized as the largest...

news.headline: Independence Pet Holdings names Munir Hafez as Chief Technology Officer to lead innovation, digital transformation.
news.summary: Experienced technology leader Munir Hafez has been named Chief Technology Officer (CTO) at Independence Pet Holdings (IPH), a prominent pet insurance and services company based in New York. This announcement was made on March 10, 2025. Hafez will be responsible for spearheading innovation and digital transformation initiatives for the organization. This strategic move aims to leverage Hafez's expertise to drive technological advancements within IPH.

news.headline: Nancy Twine partners with Ulta Beauty & Briogeo to launch Makers Mindset Workshop supporting early-stage entrepreneurs.
news.summary: On International Women's Day, a program was launched in Miami to assist early-stage entrepreneurs. The initiative, called the Makers Mindset Workshop, was announced by Nancy Twine, a renowned entrepreneur, founder, investor, and philanthropist. This free program was created in celebration of Women's History Month and aims to support individuals in the early stages of their entrepreneurial journey. The workshop offers valuable resources and guidance to help entrepreneurs succeed.

news.headline: Inventor from Indianapolis creates Attachable Lawn Mower Deflector to redirect clippings.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 10, 2025, an inventor from Indianapolis, Indiana shared the inspiration behind his creation of the ATTACHABLE LAWN MOWER DEFLECTOR. The inventor aimed to streamline the process of redirecting clippings downwards and to the side while mowing the lawn. This creation addresses the inconvenience associated with traditional methods.

news.headline: BPM LLP merges with WBM Partners LLP to strengthen Canadian presence with three locations, global footprint growing.
news.summary: Expanding company broadens reach with three branches in Canada SAN FRANCISCO, 10th March 2025 -- BPM LLP, ranked among the top 35 biggest public accounting and advisory firms in the US, reveals its enhanced presence in Canada with three new locations. This move signifies the company's strategic growth plan and dedication to extending its operations in international markets.

news.headline: AZZ Inc. to divest Electrical Products Business as AVAIL Infrastructure Solutions sells businesses.
news.summary: Today in Fort Worth, Texas, on March 10, 2025, AZZ Inc. disclosed that Avail Infrastructure Solutions (AVAIL or AIS) has finalized a deal to sell off its electrical enclosures, switchgear, and bus systems departments. This move comes as part of a definitive agreement made by the company. AZZ Inc., trading on the NYSE under the ticker symbol AZZ, shared this development with the public.

news.headline: Magcubic introduces affordable smart projectors with the HY300 Pro in 2024, disrupting the market for everyone.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Beijing, a company introduced the HY300 Pro smart projector which can turn any wall into a smart display. Despite the high costs of smart projectors, Magcubic aimed to change the market with this product in 2024. Now, they have returned with their innovative solution.

news.headline: Bitcoin miner MARA, Coinbase, and Strategy stocks plummet due to Trump's tariff turmoil, reflected by red stock market indices on Monday.
news.summary: Prominent cryptocurrency firms such as Coinbase, Strategy, and Bitcoin mining company MARA are experiencing the impact of the stock market decline, with major indices showing losses on Monday.

news.headline: SubTerra Engineering Corp. acquires Cavern Solutions Inc, a notable subsurface engineering company.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on March 10, 2025, SubTerra Engineering Corporation, a prominent company in subsurface engineering and development in Canada, revealed their acquisition of Cavern Solutions Inc. This acquisition signifies SubTerra's expansion into the storage and disposal sector. The move is significant in the industry as it merges two key players, consolidating expertise and resources. This strategic decision is expected to enhance their market position and capabilities.

news.headline: Macronix's 1Gb OctaFlash enhances STM32N6 AI MCU with advanced memory for AI apps and 3D GUI.
news.summary: Macronix International Co., Ltd. (TSE: 2337) announced the launch of a 1Gb OctaFlash™ Memory, designed to support advanced AI applications and provide users with a 3D-like GUI experience. This development is set to revolutionize the non-volatile memory (NVM) market. The product launch was made public in Hsinchu on March 10, 2025. Macronix International is a prominent player in the industry, recognized for its innovation in NVM technology. The partnership with ST further strengthens their position in the market. This cutting-edge memory solution is expected to meet the growing demand for high-performance memory in the industry.

news.headline: GLC & NFM announce 300-key Marriott hotel in Cedar Park, TX. Partnership with City, slated for construction soon.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Great Lakes Capital (GLC) from Indiana, in collaboration with Nebraska Furniture Mart (NFM) and the City of Cedar Park, has confirmed a partnership for establishing a new Marriott hotel and convention center in the center of South Bend. The agreement signifies a meaningful step towards the development of a full-service hospitality facility in the area. This initiative is set to bring forth numerous opportunities for economic growth and job creation in the region. The project is expected to propel the advancement of tourism and local businesses, with significant contributions to the overall infrastructure of the city. The collaboration reflects a commitment to enhancing the hospitality sector and attracting more visitors to South Bend, fostering both commercial and communal progression.

news.headline: ArchPoint Group acquires 50% of NatureStar North America, adding Matter® brand to Acadian Crossing's compostable products.
news.summary: ArchPoint Group, Inc., the parent company of Acadian Crossing Consumer Products, LLC, has confirmed the acquisition of a 50% stake in NatureStar North America, LLC. NatureStar is well-known for its environmentally friendly compostable and regenerative consumer products under the Matter® brand. This move brings the Matter® range under Acadian Crossing’s umbrella and presents a strategic expansion opportunity for the company in this market.

news.headline: Bitcoin dropped below $80,000 causing Coinbase, Robinhood, MARA, Riot stock plunge. Traders eyeing opportunities amidst the dip.
news.summary: The decrease in Bitcoin's value, dropping below $80,000, had a ripple effect on crypto-related stocks on Monday. Companies such as Coinbase Global Inc (NASDAQ: COIN), Robinhood Markets Inc (NASDAQ: HOOD), MARA Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: MARA), and Riot Platforms Inc (NASDAQ: RIOT) all experienced a decline in early trading. Coinbase stock saw a significant decrease of over 10.5% by 10:30 AM, attributed to Bitcoin's downward trend and disappointment surrounding the White House Crypto Summit. Additionally, the stock missed out on being added to the S&P 500 index, potentially impacting institutional investments. Despite these challenges, traders are now examining the charts for potential trading opportunities. Coinbase stock is showing bearish signals on various time frames, trading below key levels such as the eight-day ($211.20) and 20-day ($237.59) moving averages. For more detailed information, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Cyberhuman.ai and Elemind Technologies partner to improve sleep with "21 Days of Restful Sleep" program - Wearable tech + guided meditations.
news.summary: Unveiling a groundbreaking program titled "21 Days of Restful Sleep" with Dr. Deepak Chopra and Elemind by Cyberhuman.ai. This innovative ritual merges guided meditations with cutting-edge wearable sleep technology. Renowned well-being expert Dr. Deepak Chopra, in collaboration with Poonacha, introduces this unique experience aimed at enhancing sleep quality. Launching on March 10, 2025, the program offers a holistic approach to achieving peaceful and rejuvenating sleep.

news.headline: Taste of Iceland Festival starts U.S. tour in Chicago from April 3-5, 2025, offering free events celebrating Icelandic culture.
news.summary: Get ready to be whisked away to Iceland at the upcoming Taste of Iceland 2025 festival in Chicago! Hosted by Inspired by Iceland, this event will offer free festivities showcasing the finest of Icelandic culture. Scheduled to take place in Chicago, Illinois from Thursday, April 3 onward, attendees can immerse themselves in Icelandic traditions and experiences without spending a penny.

news.headline: Oil-Dri Corp. showcases lightweight cat litter at 2025 Global Pet Expo, featuring brands like Cat’s Pride, Jonny Cat, and Ultra. Booth 2020.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Oil-Dri Corporation of America, known for its lightweight cat litter products, announced its participation in the 2025 Global Pet Expo scheduled for March 26-28 at the Orange County Convention Center in Orlando, Florida. The company, listed on NYSE as ODC, will showcase its diverse brands like Cat’s Pride®, Jonny Cat®, and Ultra®, along with discussing private label options. Attendees are encouraged to visit Booth 2020 to learn more about their innovative product offerings.

news.headline: Forwardly, Inc. CEO George Sharp updates shareholders on March 10, 2025. (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) - FORW.
news.summary: Henderson, NV and Toronto, ON - On March 10, 2025, George Sharp, the CEO of Forwardly, Inc. (OTCMKT: FORW), issued important updates to the shareholders of the company.

news.summary: On March 10, 2025, the Board of Directors at Espey Mfg. & Electronics Corp. (NYSE AMERICAN: ESP) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share. Shareholders of record on March 21, 2025, will receive the payment on March 28, 2025.
